_about: OrcaSlicer / Bambu Studio process profile tuned for the bambu-rfid-tag holder. Import in Process Settings → 'Import preset…'. Inherits from the stock '0.10mm Standard @BBL X1C 0.2 nozzle'; change the `inherits` field if you're on a different Bambu printer (P1S, A1, etc.) or a different nozzle size. Filament-side recommendations (temp, fan) are in print-profile.md alongside this file.
name: 0.10mm RFID Tag Holder
